title: Infosys Receives GST Penalty Communication of INR 13,60,11,264
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that it received communication for collection of a penalty from the Joint Commissioner of CGST. The order/action relates to a total penalty of INR 13,60,11,264/- for alleged non-payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs, described as distinct persons, in guest houses for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23. Infosys stated that there is no material impact on its financials, operations or other activities.

key_facts.fact: Infosys received communication(s) for collection of penalty from the Joint Commissioner of CGST.
The total penalty disclosed was INR 13,60,11,264/-.
The demand relates to alleged non-payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs (distinct person) in guest house for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.
Infosys stated that there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Orders passed/action taken for alleged non-payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs (distinct person) in guest house for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23.

important_text_spans.text: Demand issued for alleged non- payment of GST on stay of employees of other GSTINs (distinct person) in Guest house for business purposes for FY 2018-19 to 2022-23
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the nature and period of the GST matter.

important_text_spans.text: None, there is no material impact on financials, operations or other activities of the Company.
